## edu-cli exam-node edit

Update an exam node (更新考试节点信息)

```
edu-cli exam-node edit [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --description string   New description
  -h, --help                 help for edit
      --id uint              Exam node ID (required)
      --name string          New name
      --sort-order int       New sort order
```
